blogs.title: First Post
paragraphs: This is my first blog on my personal website. In the past, I've already created a few personal websites, but hopefully this is the one I'm going to stick with until the end.
I created this blog page to document some interesting things in my journey through computer science, so hopefully there will be much more posts to come.
Keep checking this page for any more updates :)
In the meantime, lets test some formatting out. Code block, Bold, Italics. (Maybe I should add LaTeX formatting to this)
